name: Steganography Hide Zip Information in Picture File
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Steganography Hide Zip Information in Picture File
SIGMA Description: Detects appending of zip file to image

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%cat%') AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%.jpg%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.png%') AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%.zip%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Steganography Hide Zip Information in Picture File on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%cat%') AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%.jpg%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%.png%') AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%.zip%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Steganography Hide Zip Information in Picture File
